title: Opal
description: A lightweight Fabric client modpack focused on performance and stability.
body:
**Opal is a lightweight Fabric client modpack designed to improve Minecraft performance, stability, and responsiveness while preserving the vanilla experience.**

Designed for low-end systems, laptops, Chromebooks, and battery-limited devices, Opal prioritises optimisation without adding gameplay changes or unnecessary features.

If youвЂ™re looking for additional client features such as HUD enhancements or shader support, consider trying [Onyx](https://modrinth.com/modpack/onyx-client-pack) instead.


в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Key Features
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

вЂў Significant performance improvements over vanilla  
вЂў Reduced memory usage and smoother gameplay  
вЂў No gameplay changes or added content  
вЂў Fabric-based and multiplayer-safe  
вЂў Tested on low-end hardware and mobile devices 

If you want additional visual and quality-of-life features, consider using [Onyx](https://modrinth.com/modpack/onyx-client-pack), which builds on the same optimisation philosophy with expanded functionality.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Testing
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

**Tested on a laptop running Windows 11. Specs include:**
- Intel Core i5-1135G7 CPU
- Intel Iris Xe Graphics
- 8GB RAM (2GB Allocated)

Achieved average frame rate between 500 - 600 in different scenarios including world generation (fps capped at 120 in game)


**Tested on a chromebook running ChromeOS. Specs include:**
- Intel Pentium Silver N5030 CPU
- Intel UHD Graphics
- 2770MB RAM (1024 Allocated, only around 800MB available)

Achieved average frame rate between 50 - 60 in normal gameplay with around 30 - 35 fps when generating the world and loading chunks

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Notes
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

вЂў Client-side only          
вЂў Works on vanilla and modded servers (where client mods are allowed)  
вЂў Resource packs and settings included are optional and can be changed freely  
вЂў Support for older versions will take longer to release as newer versions take priority

Opal is intended to be a simple, dependable optimisation base that you can use as-is or build on with additional mods. Backup your worlds and configs when updating. This modpack is geared towards very low-end devices and therefore I will be very selective about the mods added to keep the total amount small and easy to run.
